# Tiles

The tiles component displays a collection of tile items in a grid layout. Each tile can showcase numerical data, headings, icons, or text content in a clean, organized format. Tiles are ideal for displaying statistics, key metrics, or feature highlights in a scannable grid arrangement.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the tiles component's properties in real-time.

<Canvas of={TilesStories.Tiles} />
<Controls of={TilesStories.Tiles} />

## Presentation Styles

The tiles component supports three distinct presentation styles to match different content types and visual needs:

<div
  style={{
    display: 'grid',
    gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, 1fr)',
    gap: '1.5rem',
    margin: '2rem 0',
  }}
>
  <div
    style={{
      padding: '1.5rem',
      background: '#f0f0f0',
      borderRadius: '8px',
    }}
  >
    <h3 style={{ marginTop: 0, color: '#0053A0' }}>Heading</h3>
    <p style={{ fontSize: '0.95rem', marginBottom: 0 }}>
      Default style emphasizing the heading text, ideal for statistics,
      metrics, or numerical data. Heading is prominently displayed with
      supporting content below.
    </p>
  </div>

{' '}

<div
  style={{
    padding: '1.5rem',
    background: '#f0f0f0',
    borderRadius: '8px',
  }}
>
  <h3 style={{ marginTop: 0, color: '#0053A0' }}>Icon</h3>
  <p style={{ fontSize: '0.95rem', marginBottom: 0 }}>
    Icon-based presentation for visual representation of features or services.
    Combines iconography with text for quick recognition and scanning.
  </p>
</div>

  <div
    style={{
      padding: '1.5rem',
      background: '#f0f0f0',
      borderRadius: '8px',
    }}
  >
    <h3 style={{ marginTop: 0, color: '#0053A0' }}>Text Only</h3>
    <p style={{ fontSize: '0.95rem', marginBottom: 0 }}>
      Clean text-focused presentation without visual emphasis on heading or
      icons. Provides a more subdued, content-focused appearance.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

## Grid Configurations

The tiles component offers flexible grid layouts to accommodate different numbers of items and spatial requirements:

- **Two Column**: Best for highlighting 2-4 key items with more space per tile
- **Three Column**: Default layout balancing density and readability, ideal for 3-6 items
- **Four Column**: Higher density layout for displaying 4-8+ items with compact presentation

The grid automatically adapts to smaller viewports, reducing columns as needed for optimal mobile display.

## Alignment Options

### Horizontal Alignment

Control the horizontal alignment of content within each tile:

- **Left**: Default alignment, content starts at the left edge
- **Center**: Centers content within each tile for balanced presentation
- **Right**: Right-aligns content, useful for specific layout needs

### Vertical Alignment

Control the vertical positioning of content within tiles:

- **Top**: Default position, content aligns to the top of each tile
- **Bottom**: Content aligns to the bottom, useful when tiles have varying content heights

      </td>
      <td>
        Grid columns reduce based on viewport size, maintains readability across
        all devices, touch-optimized for mobile interactions
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Usage Guidelines

### Content Recommendations

- Keep tile headings concise and scannable (2-5 words or numerical values)
- Ensure supporting content is brief and contextual
- Use consistent themes within a tile collection for visual cohesion
- Limit tile collections to 6-8 items for optimal scannability

### Grid Selection

- **Two column**: Use for small collections (2-4 items) or when each tile needs more visual weight
- **Three column**: Default choice for most use cases, balances visual impact with content density
- **Four column**: Best for larger collections (6-8+ items) or when space is limited

### Presentation Style Selection

- **Heading**: Choose for numerical data, statistics, or metrics that need emphasis
- **Icon**: Select when visual symbols enhance understanding or recognition
- **Text-only**: Use for more subdued presentations or text-heavy content

### Background Images

When enabled, background images add visual interest but should:

- Be relevant to the tile's content
- Maintain sufficient contrast with text for readability
- Use consistent image quality and style across the collection

## Related Components

- **Tile Item** - Individual tile component used within the tiles collection
- **Grid** - Base grid system used for layout structure
- **Stats** - Similar component for displaying statistical information

## Visual Regression Testing

For comprehensive testing of all tiles variations including presentation styles, grid configurations, and alignment options, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/organisms-tiles-visreg--visreg).
